title: Speed Square with 14 Types of Drill Holes, 7inch Metric Triangle Ruler, Aluminum Alloy Carpenters Tools
features: 【14 Types of Drill Gauge Holes】Comes with 14 different diameter holes, from 3mm to 15mm, this carpenters square can match a variety of mainstream screw sizes. Find the right hole in a second, then fix the screw for drilling work.

【7inch Aluminum Alloy Ruler】 Adopts aluminum alloy finishing treatment, strong structure, not easy to deformation, can maintain lasting accuracy. But the weight is only 200g, very easy to hold with one hand for a long time.

【 T-shaped Base with Scale 】Ruler have a widened T-shaped base, when you fix screws, cut, or draw lines, fit the base to the edge of the wood, the ruler is not gonna easily slide. Provide double stability to ensure accuracy of work.
【Accurate】7inch/ 180MM, all scales are in metric units and laser engraving. Accurate and clear spacing, easy to read, long time without wear.
【Multiple Uses】Available for drawing 90° Angle, balance, vertical line and drilling positioning, can also be used for positioning platform height, etc
description: Product Description The Preciva Woodworking Multi-Purpose Tripod offers you a wide range of useful functions. Speed Square design makes it easy to draw 90° angles, balanced lines and vertical lines, as well as having a drill positioning function for your woodworking projects. With a maximum length of approximately 180mm, this Speed Square board ensures a sufficient range of sizes to meet the needs of different workplaces, whether you're carrying out woodworking drawings or drilling work, it's a practical tool that adds more convenience and precision to your woodworking projects. Accurate angles and convenience The triangular ruler is like a portable protractor that can quickly plot a variety of different angles. Its clever design provides convenience and accuracy in your angle measurement and angle drawing. Precise scale lines Speed Square The precise scale is clearly visible, easy to read and won't wear out over time. Plumbline Function The plumb bob function can be used to measure the perpendicularity of an object (note: this kit does not include a plumb bob) T-edge design T-edge design for stable placement of the tape measure during measurement convenient and fast Edge markings can be made to facilitate quick drawing of straight lines
